articles.title: What to know about the highly mutated new COVID strain found in Mass. wastewater
articles.description:
is used to specify article abstract. You can only provide plain text in this element. --> Nicknamed the “cicada” variant due to its lengthy hibernation, BA.3.2 derives from a strain that first emerged in late 2021 to 2022.
